author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v4.5.2
body: ## [4.5.2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.5.1...v4.5.2) (2018-03-06) ### Bug Fixes * **connectRange:** update default refinement propTypes ([algolia/react-instantsearch#978](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/978)) ([60a2a01](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/60a2a01)) * **IndexUtils:** avoid throw an error when cleanUp multi index ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1019](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1019)) ([96d0b74](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/96d0b74)) * **SearchBox:** avoid to bind click on reset button ([algolia/react-instantsearch#979](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/979)) ([aad4791](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/aad4791))
